props.ChoiceText: In a hot room full of fear and boiling water, your steadiness helped bring both mother and child through.
props.ChoiceBio: A difficult birth taught you that folk practice is judged by its hands before its words.

0.TransitionText: Because a difficult birth taught you that folk practice is judged by its hands before its words, village need and fear kept you in cunning work.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a difficult birth taught you that folk practice is judged by its hands before its words, your remedies won enough trust to carry you toward healing work.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Physician, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a difficult birth taught you that folk practice is judged by its hands before its words, fear or wonder turned you back toward sanctioned devotion.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Religious, but you may remain on your current path instead.
